form.formComment: Returns from a 57-day let-up. Last start second last of 7 at this track on February 14 over 1160m, 17 len behind Warning Light carrying 60kg at $8. The run before that second last of 8 at Vaal on January 15 over 1200m, 10 len behind Quickfreeze with 60kg at $6. Going well. Leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Returns from a 57-day let-up. Last start second last of 7 at this track on February 14 over 1160m, 17 len behind Warning Light carrying 60kg at $8. The run before that second last of 8 at Vaal on January 15 over 1200m, 10 len behind Quickfreeze with 60kg at $6. Going well. Leading chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Brushed Bonelli in the latter stages.

form.formComment: Last start 5th of 9 at Vaal on March 26 over 1450m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Shoreybomba with 60kg at $17. Before that 5th of 8 at Turffontein Inside on March 19 over 1200m, 4 len behind Major Arcana carrying 60kg at $11. This is well within his grasp.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Last start 5th of 9 at Vaal on March 26 over 1450m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Shoreybomba with 60kg at $17. Before that 5th of 8 at Turffontein Inside on March 19 over 1200m, 4 len behind Major Arcana carrying 60kg at $11. This is well within his grasp.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At approximately the 400m, shifted out away from the crop.
Rolled out, causing Rock My Boat to be steadied at the 300m.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 36-day let-up. Most recently 2nd of 10 at this track on March 7 over 1160m, 4.5 len behind Dante's Bond carrying 60kg at $15. The run before that 3rd of 7 at this track on February 21 over 1160m, 2.5 len behind Rabble Rouser carrying 60kg at $15. Nice effort last time. Can go on with the job now.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Form hard to fault. Returns from a 36-day let-up. Most recently 2nd of 10 at this track on March 7 over 1160m, 4.5 len behind Dante's Bond carrying 60kg at $15. previousStarts.trainer: W O MARWING W H MARWING

form.formComment: Third race start. First start 11th of 13 at this track on December 7 over 1160m, 15 len behind Rockaroundtheclock with 60kg at $51. Returned from break 7th of 9 at Vaal on March 28 over 1200m, 9 len behind Geostorm with 60kg at $21. Unlikely to threaten.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(1). Third race start. First start 11th of 13 at this track on December 7 over 1160m, 15 len behind Rockaroundtheclock with 60kg at $51. Returned from break 7th of 9 at Vaal on March 28 over 1200m, 9 len behind Geostorm with 60kg at $21. Unlikely to threaten.

form.formComment: First-starter by Danon Platina out of Purely Atomic. Watch for a positive market push.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Danon Platina out of Purely Atomic. Watch for a positive market push.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Act Of War out of Shivering Sea. Prefer to see him under race conditions.

form.formComment: Last start 3rd of 8 at Vaal on March 26 over 1000m, 10 len behind Gimme Some Luck with 60kg at $67. Before that ran last of 8 at Turffontein Inside on March 12 over 1450m, 36 len behind Lone Horizon carrying 60kg at $26. Has the ability to take this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Last start 3rd of 8 at Vaal on March 26 over 1000m, 10 len behind Gimme Some Luck with 60kg at $67. Before that ran last of 8 at Turffontein Inside on March 12 over 1450m, 36 len behind Lone Horizon carrying 60kg at $26. Has the ability to take this out.

form.formComment: At debut, 2nd of 11 at Vaal on March 31 over 1200m, neck behind Viking Lass with 60kg at $21. Gave a sight and fought on well on debut. Shows ability and expected to improve. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
